issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling, token expiration, or rate limiting scenarios for API interactions.
The skill relies on TypeScript, Node fetch, and environment variables, which may not be available in all AI agent environments.

scenarios.name: Publish text+photo to Page and fetch 7-day insights
scenarios.rationale: Treatment hits the documented v19.0 endpoints (/feed with message, /photos with url+caption, /insights with the four documented metrics page_impressions/page_engaged_users/page_fans/page_views_total at period=day with since/until); baseline omits the v19.0 prefix, passes params in the query string, and requests a single metric without period/since/until.

scenarios.name: Weekly engagement plan to revive a Facebook Group
scenarios.rationale: Treatment supplies the documented Mon-Fri framework with copy/CTAs, 3 membership screening questions, 14-day post approval for new members, and a monthly Live Q&A leveraging push notifications; baseline gives generic 'post more, run polls' advice without the specific framework or moderation settings.
